name: skills_discover
description: Run a CLI binary's help output to discover its interface. Call without subcommand first to see all subcommands, then with subcommand to get detailed flags and parameters.

subcommand.description: Specific subcommand to get detailed help for (e.g. 'search', 'create')

name: skills_list
description: List all installed skills showing SKILL.md, tools.json, allowlist.json, and execution.json population status and tool count.

name: skills_read
description: Read a skill's SKILL.md, tools.json, allowlist.json, or execution.json file content.

file.description: File to read: 'skill_md' for SKILL.md, 'tools_json' for tools.json, 'allowlist_json' for allowlist.json, 'execution_json' for execution.json

name: skills_validate
description: Validate a skill's tool descriptor files for schema conformance and cross-file consistency. Reports errors (must fix) and warnings (should review).

name: skills_init
description: Initialize a new skill directory with template SKILL.md, tools.json (empty array), allowlist.json (empty object), and execution.json (empty array). Fails if the skill already exists.

skill_name.description: Name for the new skill directory

description.description: Short description for the skill's SKILL.md frontmatter

name: skills_write_skill_md
description: Write or overwrite SKILL.md for a skill. Content must be complete markdown with YAML frontmatter.

content.description: Complete SKILL.md content including --- frontmatter delimiters

name: skills_write_tools_json
description: Write or overwrite tools.json for a skill (tool definitions array). Validates JSON syntax before writing.

content.description: Complete tools.json content as a JSON array of tool definitions

name: skills_write_allowlist_json
description: Write or overwrite allowlist.json for a skill (binary→subcommand security grants). Validates JSON syntax before writing.

content.description: Complete allowlist.json content as a JSON object mapping binary names to allowed subcommand arrays

name: skills_write_execution_json
description: Write or overwrite execution.json for a skill (per-tool execution mapping). Validates JSON syntax before writing.

content.description: Complete execution.json content as a JSON array of execution specs

name: skills_write_script
description: Write a script to a skill's scripts/ directory. Creates the directory if needed. Scripts are referenced by resolveCommand in execution.json.

script_name.description: Script filename without extension (e.g. 'resolve-daily-path'). The .sh extension is added automatically.

content.description: Complete script content including #!/bin/sh shebang line

name: skills_delete
description: Delete an initialized skill package. Removes the skill directory and all version snapshots. This action is irreversible.
